businessSummary.oneLiner: Government & enterprise AI data analytics platform leader — Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), AIP (AI platform) triple-axis
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and enterprise organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+70% YoY), adjusted operating margin 57%. Friday close $150.95 (-1.66%). Jointly announced sovereign AI data center architecture with NVIDIA. Signed mission-critical AI partnerships with GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, Ondas, World View, LG CNS and others. Customer success stories unveiled at AIPCon 9. Market cap $361.0B, P/E ~240x, Forward P/E ~115x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government Contracts: Gotham/Apollo — Defense, intelligence agencies, NATO (~55% of revenue)
Commercial Contracts: Foundry/AIP — Enterprise AI platform, Boot Camp strategy (~45% of revenue)
SaaS Model: Annual subscription + expansion-based. Net Dollar Retention 120%+

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme growth premium. Reflects monopolistic AI platform positioning

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E +61% revenue growth expectations. Still elevated

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: High scalability of SaaS model. Best-in-class

keyMetrics.name: FCF Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: Stable cash generation. Achieving growth + profitability simultaneously

keyMetrics.name: Rule of 40
keyMetrics.interpretation: Revenue growth + margin = 114. Top-tier among SaaS companies

keyMetrics.name: US Commercial Growth
keyMetrics.interpretation: Explosive results from AIP Boot Camp → enterprise expansion strategy

keyMetrics.name: Net Dollar Retention
keyMetrics.interpretation: Existing customer expansion revenue exceeds churn

growthDrivers.title: NVIDIA + Palantir Sovereign AI Data Center Architecture
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): Turnkey sovereign AI DC jointly announced. GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, Ondas, World View, LG CNS adopting Palantir AIP + NVIDIA infrastructure. Global enterprise AI market expansion.

growthDrivers.title: Mission-Critical AI Partnerships Signed En Masse — Defense, Energy, Manufacturing, Aviation
growthDrivers.description: BusinessWire (3/12): At AIPCon 9, multi-year contracts with Ondas (drone ISR), World View (stratospheric ISR), GE Aerospace (military aviation), Centrus Energy (nuclear AI). Warp Speed platform for supply chain/manufacturing integration.

growthDrivers.title: FY2026E Revenue +61% Growth Forecast — Structural AI Growth Accelerating
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance: FY2026 revenue expected to grow +61%. AIP Boot Camp conversion success + government contract expansion driving momentum.

growthDrivers.title: -27% From ATH — Valuation Digestion Opportunity
growthDrivers.description: 24/7 Wall St (3/12): YTD -14.7%, -27% from ATH. Valuation discount amid structurally accelerating growth.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government/defense AI track record. Security clearance creates entry barriers. 'Ontology' platform provides unique moat as AI-human collaboration interface.

moats.description: Top-level U.S. DoD/intelligence agency clearances. Competitors cannot enter.
AI-human agent 'tool factory.' Unrivaled in battle planning and target identification.
5-day intensive pilot to acquire enterprise clients, then expand company-wide. High conversion rates.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General approach vs Palantir specialized analytics

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI competitor. Inferior in scale and profitability

competitors.name: Anduril
competitors.detail: Defense AI startup. Fast-growing but small compared to Palantir

recentNews.headline: Mission-critical AI partnerships transform Palantir's investment story
recentNews.significance: Yahoo Finance: GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, Ondas, World View, LG CNS and others adopt AIP. AI penetrating deep into defense and energy infrastructure.

recentNews.headline: Palantir partnerships tie AI to defense infrastructure amid stretched valuation
recentNews.significance: Simply Wall St: GE Aerospace (military aviation), Centrus Energy (uranium AI) expansion. Valuation high but structural growth confirmed.

recentNews.headline: AIPCon 9 — Latest customer success stories unveiled
recentNews.significance: BusinessWire: Ondas (drone ISR) + World View (stratospheric) strategic partnerships. Warp Speed platform for supply chain/manufacturing integration.

recentNews.headline: Partnership with Ondas and World View for next-gen multi-domain intelligence
recentNews.significance: BusinessWire: Palantir Warp Speed integrating supply chain, engineering, and manufacturing. Next-gen ISR mission support.

recentNews.headline: PLTR stock +2.1% — Moderately bullish activity detected
recentNews.significance: TipRanks: Post-partnership announcement stock rebound. Buying activity flowing in.

analystOpinions.notableComment: StockAnalysis: Buy consensus among 20 analysts, target $193.75 (+28%). 24/7 Wall St: YE26 $202.50. MarketBeat: $192.68. Partnership expansion increasing growth visibility.

risks.title: P/E 240x — Extreme premium valuation
risks.description: Highest level even among SaaS companies. Despite +70% growth, valuation burden. Risk of sharp correction if growth slows.

risks.title: Government budget dependency — Defense spending cut risk
risks.description: ~55% of revenue from government contracts. Direct impact from administration changes or defense budget cuts.

risks.title: -27% from ATH — Technical correction continuing
risks.description: YTD -14.7%. Momentum investor exit + profit-taking pressure.

risks.title: Stock-based compensation (SBC) — Dilution concerns
risks.description: SBC represents significant portion of adjusted earnings. GAAP profitability may be overstated.

risks.title: CEO Alex Karp image risk
risks.description: As a defense AI company, subject to anti-war activism and ethical debates. ESG investor avoidance possible.

buyReasons.title: NVIDIA Sovereign AI DC Partnership — Enterprise AI expansion
buyReasons.rationale: Joint turnkey AI infrastructure offering with NVIDIA. Direct beneficiary as global governments and enterprises accelerate AI adoption.

buyReasons.title: Mission-critical partnerships en masse — GE, Centrus, Ondas, World View
buyReasons.rationale: AI penetration accelerating in defense, energy, and aviation industries. Multi-year contracts increasing revenue visibility.

buyReasons.title: -27% from ATH discount — Valuation digestion amid structural growth
buyReasons.rationale: +70% growth maintained while stock corrects. Valuation normalization opportunity.

buyReasons.title: US Commercial +137% YoY — AIP Boot Camp explosive conversion
buyReasons.rationale: 5-day boot camp → enterprise expansion strategy proven. Commercial revenue share rising, reducing defense dependency.

overallOpinion: Palantir is structurally accelerating with NVIDIA sovereign AI DC partnership + GE Aerospace, Centrus, Ondas mission-critical contracts. Revenue +70% YoY, US Commercial +137%.
Valuation digesting at -27% from ATH, but P/E 240x remains burdensome. Forward P/E 115x also elevated. Risk of sharp decline if growth decelerates.

AIP Boot Camp conversion success + security clearance moat + NVIDIA partnership are core to the long-term growth story. Current correction offers entry for long-term investors, but valuation risk management is essential.

threads.hook: Palantir + NVIDIA AI infrastructure alliance 🤝 Partnership bomb
threads.text: NVIDIA sovereign AI DC + GE Aerospace, Centrus, Ondas multi-year deals. Revenue +70%, US commercial +137%. -27% from ATH. Is now the time? 🔗 investory.kro.kr/stock/PLTR/analysis/2026-03-14
